name: quiz-realtime-mvp
description: Full-stack MVP for real-time quizzes with React, Express, Socket.IO and SQLite.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.check: npm run check --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
